subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-04
subcodes.first_line: The prison storehouse of Tehran was no place where any soul could survive for even a month. Verily, it was a strange place, situated underground [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انبار طهران جائی نبود که کسی بتواند یک ماه زیست کند واقعا محل عجیبی بود زیر زمینی بود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @incarceration of Baha'u'llah in Siyah Chal, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
